title: fimbristylis pterigosperma
intro: Fimbristylis pterigosperma, also known as swamp lily or rice grass, is a type of wetland plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, while also being used as a treatment for snake bites and insect stings. Fimbristylis pterigosperma is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
